headline: Adobe Accelerates Agentic AI Adoption Through New Agency and Technology Partnerships
summary: CANNES, France, June 22, 2026--Today, at Cannes Lions, Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE), the global technology leader that unleashes creativity, productivity and customer experiences through innovative tools and platforms, announced new innovations with the world’s leading agency networks, technology partners and systems integrators to create, activate and measure personalized customer experiences at scale.

headline: Prime Day Is Almost Here. It’s a Test of Amazon’s AI Strategy.
summary: Amazon.com’s  upcoming Prime Day will be a litmus test for the kind of boost agentic shopping tools can have on the e-commerce company moving forward.  Prime Day is a sales event for  Amazon  Prime members.  This year, Prime Day will run from June 23 to June 26, giving members four days to check out deals on a laundry list of items, including clothes, electronics, beauty products, and more.

content.title: Prime Day Is Almost Here. It’s a Test of Amazon’s AI Strategy.

headline: Oracle (ORCL) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of enterprise software giant Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) fell 5% in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower. Alphabet fell roughly 6%. Microsoft slipped as well. When the two largest software-adjacent megacaps decline together, the sector indices follow mechanically given their index weight.
